testcases.input: binary = "001" Output: 2 Explanation: The good subsequences of binary are ["0", "0", "1"]. The unique good subsequences are "0" and "1".
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The good subsequences of binary are ["0", "0", "1"]. The unique good subsequences are "0" and "1".

testcases.input: binary = "11" Output: 2 Explanation: The good subsequences of binary are ["1", "1", "11"]. The unique good subsequences are "1" and "11".
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The good subsequences of binary are ["1", "1", "11"]. The unique good subsequences are "1" and "11".

testcases.input: binary = "101" Output: 5 Explanation: The good subsequences of binary are ["1", "0", "1", "10", "11", "101"]. The unique good subsequences are "0", "1", "10", "11", and "101".
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: The good subsequences of binary are ["1", "0", "1", "10", "11", "101"]. The unique good subsequences are "0", "1", "10", "11", and "101".
